ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "au_size" INTEGER /* Australian size equivalent */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US size equivalent */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "cup_size" TEXT /* Cup size for certain clothing items */,
  "size_eu" INTEGER /* EU size equivalent */,
  "size_jp" INTEGER /* Japanese size equivalent */,
  "size_in" INTEGER /* Indian size equivalent */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to the detailed size chart for the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes about the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., T-shirt, Dress, Pants) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the clothing item */,
  "available_regions" TEXT /* JSON array of regions where the item is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "measurement_profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's measurement profile */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object of customer preferences (e.g., favorite brands, categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_measurement_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_profile_id") REFERENCES measurement_profiles ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_profiles" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer in kg */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder width in cm */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "neck_circumference" REAL /* Neck circumference measurement in cm */,
  "thigh_circumference" REAL /* Thigh circumference measurement in cm */,
  "calf_circumference" REAL /* Calf circumference measurement in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchased item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the purchased item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback on the item's fit */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Unique order number for the purchase */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the purchase */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the purchase */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the purchase including shipping */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the stock is located */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the item */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "next_restock_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of the next restock */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* Recommended size for the item */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was last updated */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the fit (1-5 stars) */,
  "fit_feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback on the fit */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the region */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable in the region */,
  "shipping_methods" TEXT /* JSON array of available shipping methods in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currency_rates ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_rates" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., AUD, USD) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the exchange rate was last updated */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency used for the exchange rate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate data (e.g., Central Bank, Financial Institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "method" TEXT /* Shipping method (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time */,
  "handling_fee" REAL /* Handling fee for the shipping method */,
  "return_policy" TEXT /* Return policy for the shipping method */,
  "insurance_cost" REAL /* Cost of insurance for the shipping method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was returned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Processed, Refunded) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "return_shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the return */,
  "return_reason_code" TEXT /* Code for the reason of the return (for internal tracking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback submission */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the item (1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the customer */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "fit_accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the size recommendation (1-5 stars) */,
  "sizing_feedback" TEXT /* Specific feedback on sizing */,
  "sizing_accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the size conversion (1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)
